'''Outland Transit Station''', colloquially known as simply '''Outland Station''', was a massive [[Space station/Legends|space outpost]] above a barren [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and was a common destination for traders. Its key attractions were the pit beast-fighting arenas and [[Merchant Row (Outland Station)|Merchant Row]].

==Characteristics==
The station was divided into several districts. The Entertainment District contained the gladiatorial arena (famous for its beast fights). Merchant's Row housed places of business where vendors sold their wares and merchants carried out interstellar trade. Finally, the docking area housed the ships of visitors to the station. This area featured an elaborate system of conveyor belts which transferred cargo to and from waiting ships. Magnetic sealers were used to protect volatile cargo.

==History==
Outland Transit Station was built above a barren [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]], until partially destroyed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]] in an attempt to kill [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], shortly after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. During that time, [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] operated a weapons shop on the station, where he supplied [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|dexterjettster|Jettster, Dexter}}</ref> however, following the attack on the station, Jettster eventually relocated to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

At the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] and several allied [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidics]] repaired and refurbished Outland Transit Station in an effort to further their control of the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade.<ref name="LNH">''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''</ref> By the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the station had become a common destination for traders heading into [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] from the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]] and the site of many intrigues among [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], rebels, [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] operatives and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] agents during the Galactic Civil War.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
